# AI Prompt Engineering Toolkit

500+ battle-tested AI prompts for business, marketing, development & productivity.

## About

This repository contains 15 free sample prompts that demonstrate the structured prompt framework (Role → Task → Format → Constraints). The full collection of 500+ prompts is available at [streamline501.gumroad.com](https://streamline501.gumroad.com).
